name: diag-canary-hooks-1a-smoke
description: Smoke test for the wave-1a __canary* hook expansion (camera + planar + composite snapshot + dispatch). Runs against Qualia's default demo workspace (load-time data; the minimal-sample loader has a pre-existing trailing-content bug filed as a follow-up), logs the new typed envelopes via console.log so they land in the telemetry NDJSON, dispatches zoom + pan through the new named agent actions, and pixel-diffs the resulting view. Does not exercise the perspective-lock path — that requires a perspective context fixture which the demo workspace doesn't carry and __canarySpawnChildContext doesn't yet build (deferred to wave 1b alongside the §J input-dispatch + perspective-fixture hooks). See workloads/qualia/AGENT_NOTES.md 'Debug-info hook expansion (2026-05-28, wave 1a)' for the surface inventory.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); return true; })()

checkpoints.name: after-zoom-pan
checkpoints.description: Default Qualia demo workspace, Atlas context active, after a wave-1a DispatchZoom(120) and DispatchPan(50,0). The view should show the demo graph slightly zoomed out and panned right relative to the natural framing — confirms the camera-controls dispatch path is wired.
